hfb5024d3gf927g4c7bgb61bg3c0622699fdd: Pardon the viscera. One should cherish all of nature's bounty... but goblin guts are quite far down the list.
h1fb97f24g8edeg424dgaf7bg4f91a7a1dfcc: Not only do you speak with a bear, but you free it too? A true friend of nature - or perhaps a lunatic.
hb53936e4g7009g484egbe21gca7ea0b02981: Either way, I owe thanks. I am the druid Halsin.
h9fdaa70ag8615g4236ga253g1ddeb2b7f4d6: You're Master Halsin? First Druid of the Emerald Grove? Praise Silvanus for saving you.
hfabdcb3cg049dg4c3cg899eg138cb09659f2: You're Halsin? The Master Halsin of the Emerald Grove?
h6ab1bc00gc938g4504g8516gcdebea7f6b2d: It is you who should be praised, brother - you are Silvanus's instrument. And please, just Halsin. I will not demand honorifics of my saviour.
hfb23f90dgd389g4124g8f80gf1c9e0aa7be9: It is you who should be praised, sister - you are Silvanus's instrument. And please, just Halsin. I will not demand honorifics of my saviour.
hdff5c547gd96dg4f0egb38cg7115508f22a9: Yes, but just Halsin will suffice. Unbecoming to demand honorifics from the one who saved my hide.
h815e576bg46d4g4f7fgae66g1814cc4a6846: Nature's bounty to you, brother. But I must admit I have not heard of you.
h8eecf5d2g4409g41ffg88acgcbaa3ef450d0: Well, consider me introduced. And consider me grateful.
h92bff3bbg2cbag4443g9c41g3fd44a6f41a1: I spoke to Nettie - she said you could help me with the parasite in my head.
h33701c30ge775g4bbfga262gc0020d3cb9b6: Parasite in your head...? You mean you have one of them?
h650ac95egdbc2g44c8g8d83gf0ca64ba2ac4: Oak Father preserve you, child... you're infected, aren't you? The mind flayers' spawn.
h755e488fgefabg43b1gb69ag13e4055f3b3b: But... something's different. You're aware of the monster inside you. You don't bow to the Absolute, like the True Souls do...
hbd4b3927g614bg419bgb890g05a84621433e: You weren't speaking lightly when you said you needed help. Let's see what we can do.
hef512c1ag6fe7g45d5g85c7g8a0e15433f7f: There's a chokehold of magic, binding the creature to you. Any efforts to remove it would almost certainly kill you - or worse.
h20a64c6dg4ddbg447dg8658g1f63ebae4876: 'Almost'? That means I still have a chance. One I intend to take.
h0f08a477g0d7eg4f17gb42fg8da01ffef6dc: Your resolve is most admirable. It'll serve you well for where you've to go - Moonrise Towers.
h47647495ge468g45d5g8211gf55ab87bf2c6: That place is where the cultists send their captives. Innocents go in, True Souls come out. It has to be the source of this magic.
h263fad5cga878g41dagb87cgdbbeadb8fcc1: And you think I'll find a cure if I find this source at Moonrise?
h50f997efgfec0g43cdg9e9eg5be9ec04b9c6: Precisely. If we can understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
h3be6cce9g6c06g481bg9d93gbff3acbbc8fb: It's immensely powerful, whatever it is - strong enough to slow ceremorphosis to a crawl. Luckily that gives you more time.
h63153877gd407g4db7ga471g241639ecfcda: Will you come with me to Moonrise? I could use your help.
h43877037g28fcg4fcag88cdgdfcc6a3efd57: Gladly, but first I must return to the grove. As you made short work of the goblins' leaders, there's nothing stopping me. Come join me in your own time.
h315dccffg8bb1g43cag8a21gaf21d475e8ba: I can see to some matters there, and we can discuss what comes next amidst more... bucolic surroundings than here.
hb806bff4g7a11g461egb799ga413f68f6b4d: I wish I could, but there's still work I've yet to finish - blood I've yet to spill.
h540aad43gda17g41a4gadf4ge5392d40cba5: I've no right to ask more of you... but if you could help me, I'd be free to join your journey to Moonrise.
h6465e508gefddg4f46ga2e9gaa9ab08f0332: I cannot allow these butchers to threaten my grove. The natural order must be protected.
h7c061925g0fdcg4b25g8d27gf4c44ebbfd30: All right. How do I help?
h0cae7c77g4fd4g473fg9694gc3662679f6b9: My thanks. If you prevail, I'll owe you the debt of a lifetime.
hd767ab94gf19dg40b0gb812ge11ba5f336f2: It's too late to stop things from here - the goblins are already marching on the grove in force.
h3812eb2bgf87dg44afg80ccg7c98667dcbf4: You must get ahead of them, muster the defences.
h5208e0a5gceacg4004g8259gcf12f02eb112: Very well. I'll go rescue the grove.
h6336cf9dg9c59g4793g92f6g7fc2ab7fcf25: Thank you. I know it's a great deal to ask, but the grove is everything to me.
hd4f7d7eag9bc4g4051g950dgdf8be4ebc6b1: Hurry then. I will meet you there.
h0e50b9aag7e49g4502ga66bg56ad409f7e97: You ask too much of me. I can't help you.
hcaf5e88cgfae1g4e8eg8426g8765fad01514: Then the grove is doomed, and perhaps you as well.
h983e5cceg674eg4c81g804eg4fb9a8f44c8f: I'll pray to Silvanus that you have a change of heart. But time is short.
ha2242f6fg3c4bg4b38g8884g18ef7337cd2b: At least tell me what you know about Moonrise. You owe me, after all.
h73663dacg0da1g4ef8g988dgc70b03ef2425: As you wish. Better I impart the knowledge to you now, in case I fall trying to defend the grove.
hfc6eab5cgfaf4g4ba4g98a1g3c26699757c9: Rare is the beast that survives decapitation. Help me eliminate the drow Minthara, the hobgoblin Dror Ragzlin and that perversion of a priestess Gut.
hcc4f8bbbg3702g4de1ga5edgcdad9f81f015: Look around you - there's no order any more. Only chaos.
h587f7b28g10a8g4be6g855fg8eb4761dea90: Chaos is welcome, in doses; it helps keep balance. But this is too much - this is unnatural.
he95a7d98gb0d5g4b7fg96d8gfcca72ac9678: It's too late to merely kill this horde's leadership - their forces are already marching. If you want me to help, you need to help me first.
h86cfbc82gd851g40c1gb69eg1fb4ab8dbf72: Help me kill the leaders of this horde, save my grove. Then I will help you.
h1d465b95g487ag4901ga376g794ccb8c84bb: Three deaths could win us peace: the drow Minthara, the hobgoblin Dror Ragzlin and that perversion of a priestess Gut.
h02dd7d42g5f83g4c38g9a74gb5cd3b509ac9: They are the ones holding these parasites together. Remove them and nature will cure itself.
h4698be06ga3bbg4bd0gb274ge22fa99a6964: I already killed the goblin leadership.
h926a63b3gee85g48fcgb57bg53493309051f: You did...? Nature's found a most furious defender in you.
hbe6ce339g300dg47fcg91fege65ac11201c2: Very well. Return to the grove. I'll make my own way there - then we can see about this parasite of yours.
h32309ddbg269fg4d82g976bg93be7e35ea80: I'll do it. Having a shapeshifting bear-druid at my side might make things easier.
he1353f7eg4934g45afga50bgc59c7de0e202: I'll deal with this. You get to safety.
hf0153a0bgf515g4e9aga351g9c05c2f3451a: I told you, nowhere is safe. Not while this rot festers. Once it is cut out - once the grove is secure - then I shall leave.
h17f288f3g2b95g48c0g85f1g4f0b4b73733a: Follow me, then. Your bear form may prove useful.
h44a4f576g8ce4g437fg9dffgc8795abfa751: Be warned - my presence could make things more difficult... I can only restrain my bear form so much. I won't be able to help but attack goblins.
hb9ba5b11g0180g4c5egadd3gc96a7e0c304b: If I join you, we'll likely have to slaughter this entire place. You may want to use discretion when approaching the goblin leaders.
h0a120ea6gd597g4651gb46bgeecd1e2afb86: So be it. May Silvanus lend us nature's fury.
h35333e00gdb05g4514g9f3ag28eac10b191c: May Silvanus guide your hand. Focus on the leaders - that's all it will take to restore the balance here.
h2710bfc2gb490g42b2g931ag60c0fe1af9b1: All right. Wait here until it's done.
h98049409g2f6cg46e8gbfe9gd3bc46c778bf: There is no safety. Not while this rot festers. Once it is cut out - once the grove is secure - then I shall leave.
h0cb721f4gb041g4149g9bc3g8bfc00460c5b: You are aware you're asking me to kill a drow?
h086ad600g0f15g418cg9507ge3ebaf8fc623: You drow relish turning on your own, if there's something to be gained. Don't pretend otherwise.
hffc3b2efga64cg4654g8792g430057510cca: Not all drow are as you say.
h2d841720gea58g4e38gbea6gc73d558ec573: Unfair of me, perhaps, but I've had few encounters with drow to make me think otherwise.
hdcf8031egc94bg4a7dgab74gb0b4e3604615: The grove isn't my problem. I have to concentrate on saving myself.
h6444b202g5526g4662g9f78gd0cf83e2df90: I understand. You've done far more than most have for the Grove, just by freeing me.
hf4f71ae0gb15ag46c4gb92fg49abafac51d0: I cannot come with you, though I wish I could. At least let me tell you what I know; help you on your journey.
hf6a1f088gf11fg4eeegbc10g6c14c200b6ae: Travelling to Moonrise is no small task; expect dangers like you've never seen before.
hd4358f6dg3e42g4f4dgbf70ge56f204b2284: You sure about that? I'm something of an expert when it comes to imperilling myself.
h87eb3135g8233g4b01g9545g404d5193b7c2: This is different. There's more fingers on a hand than there are survivors of that place.
hf22a0e34gce2fg4cfbgbe8cg491f63d18833: To get to the towers, you'll need to pass through a terrible place - a cursed place.
h430fbec8g9af2g48b4g8577ge36a8c4a144b: This curse shrouds everything in shadow - you will not find life, light or anything natural there.
h146dc314g24d9g4c4bg9547g6877194b7587: Any who linger are twisted by the curse; they become shadow beings - tormented, dangerous souls.
h82bbae03g7d2cg4cb0g9d1fgea2608ea3341: Sounds like I've no choice - I need to find a way through.
hc7cefca2gcd72g4e28gaeafga5cb48f72718: You're half-right - you have to get to Moonrise, but you still have a choice of how to get there.
h6ef6b240g477bg459fg8a8bg4ef5fc8e6646: You could go overland - along the Risen Road or through the mountains. Easier at first, but you'll run into the shadow curse eventually.
h6fe5709fg51e2g4df8ga461g65fbdc37b516: You could also go under. There is a tunnel somewhere in this very temple of Selûne. It leads to Moonrise Towers through the Underdark.
ha2302381gd212g472bgb4fega145af22d05c: Long ago, a man called Ketheric Thorm built a secret stronghold deep down there, before rallying a whole army of Dark Justiciars - Shar worshippers.
hdda8351fg4280g48dagb7f4gaa0a3b3ceb08: Dark Justiciars? I must see for myself.
h41cfa03eg1509g4ddag8e58gaab355cbb98c: Aradin and his lot were looking for a way down there - they were promised riches if they retrieved a relic called the Nightsong. But I think there's more.
h9dd360abgeb66g4b09ga719gbdad1dfad65a: From this stronghold, Ketheric's forces could access both the temple of Selûne and Moonrise Towers - but he was defeated before he could launch an attack.
h548513c6gee6bg4be0g8468g76d821041f34: If you can find this place, I'll wager it will reveal a path to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
hb83f67b6g3ad9g490ag9cf3g16da98800b85: I found the hidden entrance in the Temple of Selûne - the way is clear.
hfe3193e0g931ag402agb301ge83821999f2f: Already...? If only I'd gone with you instead of Aradin.
h8d20a058g1d43g40fbga22ag5f69fe25910b: I've already found a way into the Underdark. I can pick up the trail from there.
h57087b12ge8a1g4635gb702g6d281c45e009: So how do I find this underground route?
h17571209g6cb3g47dcga7f9g022f094fe05d: You'll need to pick up where Aradin left off - find the hidden entrance. It's somewhere in these ruins, from what I've heard.
h2522b8adg4c0eg4fd3g81c9g5159e3e3d7fb: One of the adventurers had a clue to help find it - a dwarf called Brian. It might still be found on his corpse, wherever the goblins left it.
hf1e63234ged69g4e79ga0ffg847b743381bc: I don't want to risk getting lost in the Underdark - I'll journey overland.
hd69f416cg4504g4cf8gbaf4gfec499565078: You may reconsider once you see the effects of the curse for yourself.
h7f30e7daga35bg41b5g8cb3g7b8c9960840b: How do I find this passage through the Underdark?
hccad9a44g2688g4d5egbf52gbd9c6cd9f6c9: Say I decide to try this Underdark route after all - how do I get started?
h6f9ae8ffgf4b5g4084gaca8g3a1ae5c9e4d7: What business do you have at Moonrise? You said you'd go there, if you could.
hbc3c533dg1cdag47f6ga5e9g204014431ad8: Those illithid creatures threaten the natural order - it's my duty to do what I can to stop them.
hec7426dfgc505g4e22gaecdg29f835d32b40: There's also the shadow curse - it's an affront and must be cleansed.
h3be5af1dgf4c8g4dd9g8ea4g87360f5e6202: I helped overthrow Ketheric Thorm and his Dark Justiciars, years ago. But I failed to prevent him from unleashing darkness across the region before he was defeated.
he402a582g1128g4f4bg8be6g7555505ffe21: I spent years researching the curse, trying to put an end to it. Nothing has worked - yet.
h85a043d6gbad2g49bbgb474gbb0f44fab731: If I could join you and get close to Moonrise, perhaps I could have both helped you find a cure for your infection and lifted the curse.
heea56e98g106eg4079g86acge895465dd7ae: But the grove must come first, I'm afraid.
hc33855efgd56fg49afga808g2de542b2c46f: Is that why you went with Aradin? You thought he might uncover this route to Moonrise?
h5c3e4b2eg04f1g49edgbffdg282379d208ab: Precisely. Then perhaps I could have done something about both the shadow curse and ceremorphosis aberrations.
hc0aec4a1g0724g446bga213ga3ec47ef84e7: But in my eagerness, I put far too much faith in the abilities of Aradin and his band. We didn't even get close.
hfdd3c734g6929g43f4gbd6cg5b8c82a0f6fb: One of those who died had a clue that was supposed to help us find the hidden entrance to the Underdark.
haa839dbcg87dag451bg97a0g5031492369d9: A dwarf called Brian, I believe. Though there's no guarantee that the goblins left him recognisable.
h3cab2044ga0a6g4a02g9ce7gbbb9ca3c7fd7: I may live to regret this - or maybe I won't - but fine, I'll help you save the grove first.
hf9df09e8g4f2cg4766g8dcbgaa2219121c54: You will? Oak Father bless you. I'll be in your debt twiceover if we succeed.
hc9e03ec6g7250g453fga3f7g6dd485775745: Now, there's no time to lose - get to the grove and help with the defences.
hbdf07467g0a39g4493g95b6g65a83351b428: You know what's needed - the deaths of Dror Ragzlin, the drow Minthara and the priestess, Gut. May nature guide you.
h66d593c1g57fdg4f76gbc9bg0259a4069894: I could come and help you... but be warned, I won't be able to suppress my animal side. Subtlety will not be an option.
hd8ac8853gf719g4bd8gb5b6gae8595168cd3: I'm sorry I can't do more. Thank you, and good luck with the grove.
h77774eafg368bg448dg92f0gf2dc6aebfd06: I'll need that luck, along with all the Oak Father's blessings.
he25a99dcgc2dbg4b08gae34ga08e7d9dfee8: It seems the Absolute's forces are already marching on the grove. I'll have to try get ahead of them, do what I can.
h71cbf128ga1dcg4a79g9b53g8bfec79394c4: Farewell. I don't expect we'll meet again - at least not in this life.
h2c7f6463gf7abg4ee6gb942g17492e9e8741: I'll remain here and do what I can to disrupt these cultists' plans. Perhaps I can stop their attack before its even launched. Farewell.
hda69e9b8g322bg49f8ga742ge16365b7d84a: We're done here. I'll be on my way.
h06ea679fg0289g49f8g9556g6f09998e3ebf: I never thought I'd say this, but it sounds like the Underdark is the safer route.
h210637f4g318bg46d4g8184g9b2961124694: Anything is preferable to risking the shadow curse.
hb73072c2g7dfcg4977gafb2gea8f09efbb33: I know the Underdark - it's lethal. I'll travel overland.
hcdb1df9bg36f8g478fgba0bgf0aaf773f2ab: The Underdark's my home. Better to take that route than risk this curse.
haff4ac3agc8e2g4fddgbe2dg4fb017c49a2d: The decision is yours, but I'd favour the Underdark. Even a place like that is the lesser evil compared to the shadow-cursed lands.
he3f51cc6g7a4eg4c75ga290g9fa142a59154: This shadow curse - does it affect Shar worshippers?
h5f5cae99gc3f0g4aebg917bgfb0617abef44: I don't know. Ketheric's followers were defeated or vanished before the effects of the curse took hold.
h2efc331dg39c5g469eg9e33gc737ba783c53: Are these Sharrans still to be found?
h3dec3e0ag9914g49abgbe5eg1de75a05565e: As bones, perhaps. But their hidden structures might still remain.
hd5888286g6233g4b1aga5b1gac319985e06f: The Absolute's forces can tolerate such a place?
hccffaa28g0447g4846gba74ge31c87a397d8: So it seems, though I don't know how. You will have to choose your approach carefully.
hd5d0c7a8gb00dg4ca1gb7e4gd4d7e8458ae9: There must be another way to cure myself - my kin have dealt with these parasites before.
h5f19a7b1gd4e8g4987g90afg484580499bff: There must be another way to cure myself.
hb3fa91e0gb5f4g447cgb670g22c9b2859676: By all means - pursue any leads you may have. But I sense all roads will lead to Moonrise.
h0550db23gc481g46d9g9c9dgc3bf80ebd952: How are you so sure Moonrise is where I have to go?
ha7dfcc98g6db5g4d3dgb5a9ge9d0f722a72b: Nature speaks to me. Birds report what they've seen. And I've overheard goblins speaking of it too. Moonrise is at the heart of all this, I'm sure of it.
h10eabba7g40bdg4d4bg81f7gb880a5f7b694: I think you're exaggerating. You just want me to stay and help you.
h6f190745ga044g45ecgbab2gdbb241f3634d: I do want you to help me, yes. But I am not exaggerating.
hbd80c0bdg4414g4b16gaf03g994fc19e6d19: Don't make it sound so tempting. I already know you'd rather I stayed and helped you.
h3cbfd5e3g5f2dg4b83g982bgb6f3914f632c: That's true, I won't lie. But I won't let you march towards Moonrise without knowing what you'd face.
hb4a931c7g9f0cg4659g9391g9e65d4c32937: Tell me, then. I'm going to do whatever it takes.
hbd6c41eeg2793g487fgbb22g537a0013936f: True, but I mustn't be seen spilling drow blood. Stay here - I'll kill the trio quietly.
h04f266e1gccbcg4431gbfc5g9136ed94004c: Very well, but no witnesses can survive. We will kill this whole camp together.
hd06609e7g63c0g44f5ga276g83034720fc8a: There's no pretence in not wanting to play the assassin. You're on your own.
hf04c4da0g4855g4f79gbafdg6f467a57dc34: Best if I try settle this discreetly - wait here, and you'll have your deaths.
h87417761gfae6g43d4ga54bg99c77fcb84f1: Kagha was swayed by Shadow Druids. She nearly sealed the grove.
hc60c1ca8g2d5cg49b8gb5acgbe400ae603bb: Kagha... I should have suspected she'd take things too far. I'll deal with her when I can.
h40659b5bg27a6g4b93g8f69g5ce6fdc06787: But there are other matters to attend to before that.
hc462d573g45d5g4b3cgb74eg33c05877b2f2: Kagha is dead. She was swayed by Shadow Druids. I had no choice.
h21aff5cagad19g48aag81d2g180f95756de6: Kagha... this is my fault - I was her teacher. I will mourn her when I can.
h7b912ae7ge4ceg4504ga848g44992eb25e86: The other druids are dead, by my hand.
h2ab53a35g1478g486bg8bffg57fd747b681e: They left me no choice. I had to defend myself.
h1bba40fdg10f0g4392gbe40gc2118c36ceec: Then... then it is as you say. They forgot their principles; you had no choice. I will mourn them when I can.
he6b82d26gdc83g41d3g95ccgd16cbb7951f6: I've explained all that I'm going to. Accept that or I'll give you the same treatment they got.
hf2ace545g28dag4cedg99fcgecaa1133525c: You rabid dog. Murderer! Those were the servants of Silvanus - nature's guardians!
ha5a4f5b9ga09bg42e2g96ecgf978cd7d6c81: You will not see another day.
hb5e6f3ebg8414g417cg94c8gf9a2c5cbc2c0: Kagha carried out the Rite of Thorns - the grove has been sealed off from the world.
heb29bc3fg77f7g429aga9dfga657759a964d: The grove is lost to me. To everyone. It's useless for me to stay here... there's nothing left to fight for.
had7b5cccg8e5bg4b0ega2f9gc0405534abed: I will find you at your camp, and help you with your problem. Right now, I... I need to go be alone.
hc2e1625eg60d1g4cf5gbf5cgaf0fc305ab9a: If you should have a chance to strike down the leaders of this horde, the world will be a better place for it. Farewell.
heb2c360bgaa40g41a1ga1f3g12951414e44f: Altered parasites? A cure at Moonrise Towers, maybe? Sounds like guesswork at best.
he414cc1cgd194g4a30ga8ccg77999d260839: I'm as certain as I can be. If you have a better alternative, I won't stop you.
he9893761gfe16g48f8gb1e5g8a4222149768: Not that I'm eager to try stopping you, given the short work you made of the leadership here. With them dead, it's high time I got back to the grove.
hadd7190bg5ef5g4e1fga67egbc61236cbc7e: I can't stop you, in fact. Which brings me to my next problem...
hc5e83130g95c8g462bg93f4g6fafad55106a: At least I know what to do now. Good luck to you.
h37e1372agaf1cg48bdgbfadgdb1eba011ace: Wait. Now that the goblins' leaders are dead,  I could join you - help you find a cure. I just need to make arrangements back at the grove. Find me there, if you wish.
h22edf707g26ecg4994gafb4g434b8aab8f6b: Wait - I could help you find a cure... but I need to settle matters here first.
h3e833959ga48cg4bd9g989fg98b760992224: That must be where the ship was taking me - before it crashed.
h4b87ca81gc251g4499g9d6fg03430dd314d3: Be glad it did, or you'd be a True Soul by now.
hda31dc91g379fg4c87ga800g7af30b7b9e98: If we can get to Moonrise and  understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
hf701a443g1c6ag4974gacc2g85023cde4f12: I wasn't taken to Moonrise - I was infected on a mind flayer ship, before it crashed.
h0132f381gce07g4b78g9db9ga41c38a0687a: And where do you suppose that ship was taking you? Moonrise, I'll wager. The journey differs, but the problem is the same.
h560bf37fgb99cg4886g804fg45eef01b7664: That doesn't sound much like hope to me. Can't you help?
h8dcda7efg7360g4e6eg8f0eg24237533825d: Patience. I can't just snap my fingers... but I know where the solution almost certainly lies -  Moonrise Towers.
h51672e5eg6bb2g45a1gbd69g18606a35eccd: This magic isn't typical of ceremorphosis?
hd6002bf0g285cg42a6ga825g8174b8c48354: No, this is different. Altered. But I believe I know where answers can be found - Moonrise Towers.
h1ea3cebdgbf76g4840g96dcgb5616de88263: You learned all this from your studies?
h2090a497g7a6dg49b1gbf79gbcb856297038: Indeed. After we dealt with the drow that ambushed us, Nettie and I were able to inspect the corpse - and the creature that slithered out of it.
hcee1b532gd273g4ef5g8e1eg001cf0d99c2b: I had no idea anyone beyond their ranks was infected. You have my sincere sympathies.
hbd049424g364ag4931gbf30g09abccb5db62: This magic you mentioned - it isn't normal for these parasites?
h619d30e8g38f7g4648gba15g4bbfa6a8d41a: How do you know all this?
h9ad5243agea5eg4a2bg964dgcb2c6f5eecb7: A drow forced me to defend myself. Afterwards, I was able to study the parasite that slithered out of the corpse, see what drives these 'True Souls'.
h92313bddg4f33g4c58g8a48gf3b19e77685f: It's no coincidence that you found me here, I'll wager? You're after a cure for this parasite.
hb3f63a03gf2beg4eeag8af9gbebee4ac9f68: I escaped from an illithid ship after being infected. Maybe the process was interrupted.
h665ad612g71a1g483dgbf5bg937957507929: Perhaps... but I wouldn't want to place all my faith in blind luck.
h57ee18e0ge6a7g44fag94a2g21ad6ea67b12: A being called Orpheus is protecting me; shielding me from the worst of the parasite's magic.
h0fdeff8eg5649g4eabg8a48gaa110a059fe7: That sounds... novel. But all right, who is this Orpheus? I'd like to bend the ear of anyone who knows about these things.
h3f269799g3885g4443g96f1g301db52bc9ca: It's... complicated. But he's proven helpful. Trust me.
hea94d431g18c5g4895gb1f2g775ee95daf61: I'd still be target practice for goblins if you hadn't come along. I think I can trust you.
h7282dbdbg9869g4bbbg8c3bg53e4109acc90: This 'Orpheus' character might be offering you protection, but it sounds like you still need to find a cure - that's something I can help with.
h58b9095cgbffeg475fg81c0g7a80c1e63683: But I'm afraid it won't be easy, or quick.
h339673aeg4679g41d9gb2aag828f40df2d91: I don't know the truth about him. I'm not sure he even has an ear to bend.
hb6f13bd5gd144g462ag894bgb0cb1e70b086: Hmm. There's only so much stock you can place in mysterious friends with unknown agendas.
h43f26313g01b6g4e24gabc1gea840ad6c39a: I've heard you're an unmatched healer. I need your help.
h10f26a17g5108g42f0g8ee5g450dd75784b3: Indeed? Not the most opportune moment, but given the lengths you went to, I assume there's some urgency.
hba5009e7g18d5g4199g817egd0feca5dae88: Come on then, what's the problem? Unless you'd rather wait for an audience of goblins.
h76d4dea2gfe59g4813g91d2ge6ec7060bc0f: Impressive healing skills. I need the help of someone like you.
h365e523bg069ag4c0fg9a89g31829e5c1bdc: I've been to the Emerald Grove. It's in grave danger, it sorrows me to say.
hb322ec8fg3092g4e1fg8ee8ga4e58ee2988a: I've been to the Emerald Grove. It's in danger.
h4b631633g0f5eg496ag93d4gd77f5e92a2ff: I am aware. I foolishly left it vulnerable to this rabble. There's work to be done.
h86ac07bfgd923g4ca2g837ag2eb030640973: ... Hrrm. That look in your eyes - I've seen it before. Are you feeling all right?
h070b2585g8f62g4148g83feg9cfe6fb9fcd8: You should get out of here. It's not safe.
hafcefbdeg0d7eg4d56g8b93g247faa338799: Oh I'm quite aware of that, rest assured - but where is safe right now?
h49f43b55g299bg40f9g9c2age9829249a69d: The bear is a noble beast. I will not fear it, or abandon it.
hcb5fbc99g1511g4a4dg8d08g97c88eb81891: A jest - I truly am grateful. If only I could repay you.
h1b242b42g1a97g48f1gb590g1b937c77b5bf: You owe more than thanks, I think.
h5c90f374g39c0g4836g9eedg4671ae031820: Oh, certainly. But I live modestly at the best of times, and this is far from the best of times.
h53a05561gb284g47acg9155g009d27d0ab53: Perhaps there's something else I can offer you.
h3908a96cg6eb8g4ca5gab15g8bc90e57c9a2: You aided a bear, without knowing if it would savage you? A true friend of nature - or perhaps a lunatic.
hca2f5126g84e8g4329ga0f2gfa35ade8516b: You did it. You actually did it! The leaders dead - praise Silvanus.
hd3ba09c3g107ag4cdag8c85g5b2513652426: No, that's not right - praise you, my friend. The grove owes you a debt beyond measure.
h6e6a2eb4gbf50g403cg8e7bg75834aee0e36: Killing's never my first choice, but those three were too dangerous to leave alive.
hd668b64bgaa8ag47efga44ag2435230c2880: I've done my part - now tell me about Moonrise.
h801794eaga1f7g43ecg99b2g984e56530c64: Let's get out of this pit, firstly.
hd11ed045g4ecdg41d1gb7b4g3c4fa9d34e33: Return to the grove; I'll make my own way there.
he0a6677cgd21fg4359gaa3dg11140d873d13: And you'll receive it, soon enough. Return to the grove; I'll make my own way there.
h7d163c4fg68f5g445ag983ag4c8ce99ff155: I'll make my way to the grove - join me there.
hf9a966e8g1530g4970gaa5fgb5fba320aee0: Nature's blessings. I thought you'd be on your way by now... unless you changed your mind?
hba78a850gd410g4717gb29fg99df262e5227: I can't help you. I just need you to tell me about Moonrise Towers.
h8ec4005bgdd8cg46f8g99abg6bfbca364f4f: Nature's blessings. Are you ready to do what is necessary?
h8a821791gbf30g4589ga648g8a9037a54650: Tell me what you know about Moonrise Towers.
hae85a698gd2dcg4624gb44agbf7dec94642c: The grove is counting on us.
h8f6262dbgea39g471cga0b8gaf6ac7bdddc3: Where are you going? We have work to do - enemies to kill.
h151747a5g65e9g48ebg9782g761087900bf3: Of course. Let's focus on that.
h5e90f107g9c7eg4a0bg95e4g60970a16c28b: This will have to wait for now.
h2a4d3a74g916dg4c1fg99acg6d6e2363f87e: I'll wait here. Just know that you're gambling with the grove's very existence.
h2e956fa2gf24dg4eabgaf49gd9099b6ab827: The ringleaders have to die. The very natural order of things is in danger, thanks to them.
hc0fa3c51g8352g4538g9348gda7e863f8af4: Come with me. I could use your help.
hc4b73449g67adg4b6dga912gdf976923ac4a: Very well. My claws are yours.
h622f43bfg9c98g4c04gab65ge2298c5c63a1: All the leaders are dead - the grove's safe.
